examples.title: Event timeline
examples.description: A proportional schedule strip with fired and upcoming events.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { EventTimeline } from '@lostgradient/cinder/event-timeline';
</script>

<EventTimeline
  label="Next 24 hours"
  start="2026-07-03T00:00:00.000Z"
  end="2026-07-04T00:00:00.000Z"
  now="2026-07-03T10:30:00.000Z"
  items={[
    { at: '2026-07-03T02:00:00.000Z', label: 'Digest', sublabel: '02:00', state: 'done' },
    { at: '2026-07-03T10:00:00.000Z', label: 'Retry', sublabel: '10:00', state: 'failed' },
    { at: '2026-07-03T16:00:00.000Z', label: 'Deploy', sublabel: '16:00' },
    { at: '2026-07-03T22:00:00.000Z', label: 'Archive', sublabel: '22:00' },
  ]}
/>

examples.title: Overlapping labels
examples.description: Nearby events are nudged into separate label lanes.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { EventTimeline } from '@lostgradient/cinder/event-timeline';
</script>

<EventTimeline
  ariaLabel="Clustered deployment timeline"
  start="2026-07-03T12:00:00.000Z"
  end="2026-07-03T18:00:00.000Z"
  items={[
    { at: '2026-07-03T13:00:00.000Z', label: 'Queued', sublabel: '13:00', state: 'done' },
    { at: '2026-07-03T13:20:00.000Z', label: 'Started', sublabel: '13:20', state: 'done' },
    { at: '2026-07-03T13:40:00.000Z', label: 'Checked', sublabel: '13:40' },
    { at: '2026-07-03T16:30:00.000Z', label: 'Promote', sublabel: '16:30' },
  ]}
/>
